ticket.subject: VB: [36807221] Which product is the right one for me?
ticket.raw_subject: VB: [36807221] Which product is the right one for me?
ticket.description:
Hi!

I want to use PostNL for my website but I don't know what services that is added on MCSL which corresponds to the services that is included in my contract. Do you guys know what shipping option is what for PostnL?


NOVUS TERRA
Behzad Rostamian
073 - 615 30 83
Behzad.rostamian@novusterra.se<mailto:Behzad.rostamian@novusterra.se>

Från: Channel Integrations <channel.integrations@postnl.nl>
Skickat: den 19 mars 2026 15:24
Till: Behzad Rostamian <behzad.rostamian@novusterra.se>
Ämne: [36807221] Which product is the right one for me?


Dear Behzad,

Thank you for contacting us. Judging from the images and the description provided, it seems this is all within the PluginHive environment: You will need to contact the creator of that extension for support, or at least the one who has built the PostNL part of it. We did not develop this, nor maintain it.

We only support our own Magento 2 extension: https://github.com/postnl/postnl-magento2/

I will try to provide some information that may help you got choose the correct shipping product. But cannot guarantee this works as is, as the PostNL carrier option is not made by us.

For 6942 which size and weight (2kg) restrictions may fit in a letterbox, refer to the table in our developer portal:
https://developer.postnl.nl/docs/#/http/reference-data/product-codes-international/international-mail-packets
Our name for this product 6942 is (Packet) "Boxable Track & Trace", which you will need a contract with your PostNL account manager. In fact, any product related information regarding product code to be used, prices, size, handover/operations agreements, please contact your account manager.
It is not a Parcel, which shape may not fit in a mailbox at all. On the screenshot provided, none of them seem to be described as a Packet Track & Trace.

It may very well be, that the developer who built this PostNL part for PluginHive, did not include any International Mail & Packet product for Belgium/EU and Outside EU at all. Please contact them for details.

For shipping parcels as you described, you can use 3085<https://developer.postnl.nl/docs/#/http/reference-data/product-codes-dutch-domestic/standard-dutch-domestic>, which is Standard Shipment for parcel domestic shipping (within Netherlands). This may be the "Dutch Domestic Standard Shipment" at the very top of the list. If you prefer additional services, you may need to check if the name correlates with our listing in: https://developer.postnl.nl/docs/#/http/reference-data/product-codes-dutch-domestic/destination-netherlands

I hope this helps you to find the right answers. Please let us know if there are any questions remaining.

Kind regards,

Chi-Ho Tse
Channel Integration Consultant

Waldorpstraat 3 * 2521 CA Den Haag
Postbus 30250 * 2500 GG Den Haag
www.postnl.nl<http://www.postnl.nl>

Get started with our API's by downloading our Postman collection: developer.postnl.nl/tools

Case reference: [thread::iEmV6NZeemqxy95sLkTNuy8::]
Please do not remove.


Onderwerp
Which product is the right one for me?

Klantvraag
Hi!

I use PluginHive Multi carrrier shipping extension for Magento 2 and now added PostNL to it. With this website, we are going to use Tracked letterboxes. I think the product code is 6942 , packages that can be delivered in the mailbox.

But in Magento, they dont actually show the products, they have explanations instead, so can you please tell me which of these are the product that i need?

I will ship to consumers and not businesses.

The second question is, if i am going to send parcels in the netherlands, which of these products is right for me also? We are going to send packages 0-20 kg.

so i need which of these products in magento is the Tracked letterbox service for shipping to sweden and which of these are the national packages within NL for packages 0-20kg

I have more pictures of the Dutch domestic, but i cannot upload anymore here..


Webform E-mail
Behzad.rostamian@novusterra.se<mailto:Behzad.rostamian@novusterra.se>
Webform Klantnummer
10948343
Webform Bedrijfsnaam
VERIDA BV
Webform Voornaam
Behzad
Webform Achternaam
Rostamian
[https://mijnpostnl.my.salesforce.com/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?oid=00Dw0000000CncL&esid=018c100000S7QYl&from=ext]
Dutch - Domestic shipping 4.png
Dutch - Domestic shipping 3.png
Dutch - Domestic shipping 2.png
Dutch - Domestic shipping 1.png
Magento - Swedish tracked service.png

comments.body:
Hello Behzad Rostamian,

Good day!

I would be happy to check this further for you. Before proceeding, could you please let me know if there are any other PostNL service codes you are looking to use apart from 6942?

This will help us review all the required services together and provide you with the correct mappings.

Looking forward to your response.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Need assistance from L3 team:

**Case:** The customer is looking for the service name associated with PostNL service/product code **6942**.

**Details:**
This is a $49 Premium Plan Magento MCSL customer who is trying to ship using PostNL but is unable to identify the service corresponding to their contract (service code 6942).

For troubleshooting, we attempted generating 10+ labels and were able to find services associated with the following codes: 4940, 1010, 4952, 3385, 4944, 3085, and 4950. However, we could not find any service corresponding to **6942**.

As per PostNL documentation, service code 6942 refers to **“Boxable Track & Trace” (Packet)**. However, we are unable to find a matching or similarly described service within the app.

Could you please help us identify the corresponding service or confirm its availability?

**Store Details:**
Store URL –https://www.scandinavianspeciosa.se/sv
Account ID –f9f4a04f-ae4c-45fa-8fb8-a2032b0a4de3

comments.body:
The PostNL service with product code **6942 (Boxable Track & Trace – Packet)** is currently not available in the app, as it is not yet mapped in our integration. We will enhance the app in a future update to include this PostNL service.
Please move this card to Dev_needed after replying
-[Athul]
comments.html_body:
The PostNL service with product code 6942 (Boxable Track & Trace – Packet) is currently not available in the app, as it is not yet mapped in our integration. We will enhance the app in a future update to include this PostNL service.
Please move this card to Dev_needed after replying
-[Athul]

The PostNL service with product code 6942 (Boxable Track & Trace – Packet) is currently not available in the app, as it is not yet mapped in our integration. We will enhance the app in a future update to include this PostNL service.
Please move this card to Dev_needed after replying
-[Athul]

comments.body:
Hello Behzad,

Thank you for your patience.

The PostNL service with product code **6942 (Boxable Track & Trace – Packet)** is currently not available in the app, as it is not yet mapped in our integration. We will enhance the app in a future update to include this PostNL service.

We will keep you update on this.

Regards,

Sibi Firoz
Team PluginHive
